headline: Palestinian refugees forced to flee the southern Lebanon: 'All my life, I have only known displacement'
description: Evacuation orders from the Israeli army, which signal incoming bombardments, now include for the first time all three Palestinian camps in the Tyre region. Issued on Wednesday and renewed the following day, these orders forced thousands of Palestinian refugees to flee their homes.

headline: French sociologist, philosopher and intellectual provocateur Edgar Morin has died aged 104
PSG-Arsenal: Paris braces for a tense weekend with Champions League final and several large concerts
Patrick Artus: 'Wars are economically irrational. Yet, the risk of new conflicts remains high'
description: The economist outlines five main reasons why the militarization of international relations is on the rise.

headline: French Open 2026: Moïse Kouamé's meteoric rise
description: Poised for greatness, the 17-year-old French player has won his first two matches at the Paris Grand Slam and faces Chilean Alejandro Tabilo on Saturday in the third round. It is a spectacular ascent for a player already recognized as a young phenomenon.

headline: The little-known story of Bella Ariel, a Lanvin model murdered at Auschwitz
description: Journalist and author Arnaud Nemet tells the story of his great-grand-aunt, Bella Ariel, a celebrated 1930s model whose life was both dazzling and tragic. A Jewish immigrant from Constantinople, she was arrested after a denunciation and murdered at Auschwitz-Birkenau at 31.

headline: José Tolentino de Mendonça, the poet cardinal reconciling the Church and contemporary art
description: The Portuguese prelate has become a prominent figure in the world of contemporary art, befriending artists and film stars. As the driving force behind the Vatican Pavilion at the recently opened Venice Biennale, he has used his progressive outlook to help bridge the Church and a world that long viewed it with suspicion.

The Bolloré protégée spreading Russian propaganda in France
description: Xenia Fedorova, the former director of the now-banned Russian channel RT France, has free rein to advance the Kremlin's version of events without contradiction across the media empire of far-right billionaire Vincent Bolloré.

headline: 'Reckless, racist, incompetent and treasonous': Bruce Springsteen delivers scathing indictment of Trump at Washington concert
description: During the final concert of his US tour, the 76-year-old artist accused the Republican president of 'destroying the American idea and our reputation around the world.'

headline: 38° at 11 am. French students and staff struggle with unbearable classroom temperatures
description: Across France, primary, middle and high schools have reported the severity of the situation in their overheated classrooms. Education professionals are criticizing the lack of response in recent years from both local authorities, who are responsible for school buildings, and from the Education Ministry, in charge of the safety of students and staff.
